To determine if the model (a right-angled triangle with one vertical and one diagonal line) appears in the pattern, we need to carefully compare the two images.

1. The model has a diagonal line sloping upward to the right and a vertical line connected at the top of the diagonal.
2. The pattern in the second image has a similar structure, with a diagonal line sloping upward to the right and a vertical line connected at the top of the diagonal.

Since the model appears in the pattern in the exact orientation, the answer is **X**.
